# Chapter 4: Instabilities, runaway, buckling, resonance  (~100 pp)
- 4.1 Buckling at depth (12) · 4.2 Aeroelastic instability (15) · 4.3 Thermal runaway (15) · 4.4 Chemical runaway (12) · 4.5 Mechanical resonance failures (12) · 4.6 Numerical instability as engineering failure (12) · 4.7 Failure section (case): Tacoma Narrows, Texas City refinery 2005, Therac-25 race condition, Lyon-Saint-Exupéry station roof (22)

**Archetype**: stability, failure. **Project**: simulate two of these instabilities in software; verify against published accident data. **Exercises**: 25.
